violations.span: On the bus he wondered whether next time through security his medal would set off the metal detectors
violations.evidence: Source paragraph ch1§1¶21 places this thought at the security checkpoint, before Ben boards the bus. Paragraph ¶22 then describes boarding the bus. The bridge incorrectly locates the thought 'on the bus.'

violations.span: focus that pulls you forward, and learning along the way
violations.evidence: Cited source paragraphs (ch1§2¶21 and ch1§2¶22) only list the first of three core benefits: 'Goals give you a sense of achievement.' The second and third benefits ('focus that pulls you forward' and 'learning along the way') do not appear in any cited source paragraph.

violations.span: The first: believe in the goal
violations.evidence: Cited source paragraph (ch2§2¶22) reads only 'Ben and the crew used a number of methods to keep them going day in day out:' — it ends with a colon and does not name 'believe in the goal' or any first method. The labelling of this as the first strategy is not present in the cited source.
Source paragraph ch3§1¶8 names the driver as 'John' ('John had been driving through south east London'). The name 'Brock' does not appear anywhere in the cited source paragraphs.

violations.span: Our Lottery grants paid rent and food
violations.evidence: Cited source paragraphs (ch3§1¶15, ch3§1¶17, ch3§1¶19) discuss tight budgets and what the training plan included, but none of them state that Lottery grants specifically paid for rent and food. The phrase 'Lottery grants' and the claim they covered rent and food is not present in any cited paragraph.

gate_reasoning: Five bridge units contain specific claims not supported by their cited source paragraphs. The violations range from a wrong driver name ('Brock' vs 'John' in u_03_0004), to temporal misplacement of an event (the medal/metal-detector thought placed 'on the bus' in u_01_0008 when the source locates it at the security checkpoint before boarding), to content absent from cited paragraphs entirely (two of three goal benefits in u_01_0024, the label 'The first: believe in the goal' in u_02_0017, and the Lottery-grants/rent-and-food claim in u_03_0007). Because at least one violation is a factual name error and others introduce content not present in any cited source paragraph, the gate cannot pass. Each flagged bridge must be revised to entail only from its cited source paragraphs before the gate can be re-run.
